name: auto-entity-diagram
description: Zero-config interactive ER diagrams for Entity Framework Core. Scans your workspace for DbContexts and migrations, then generates a beautiful, self-contained HTML diagram with a migration timeline.
author: AutoEntityDiagram contributors

scripts.demo: node bin/auto-entity-diagram.js examples/WebShop -o docs/demo/webshop.html --title "WebShop — Entity Diagram"
